report.summary: UX audit and visual polish for 2 new learn pages (Bitcoin Mining Profitability, Crypto ETF Options Trading), added missing navigation components, created OG images, and fixed mobile responsiveness.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Bitcoin Mining page: Added Breadcrumb navigation component for consistent wayfinding
Bitcoin Mining page: Added BackToTop component for long-form content scrolling
Bitcoin Mining page: Added reading time estimate and publication date in hero badges
Bitcoin Mining page: Fixed OG image URL reference (was pointing to non-existent og-mining-2026.png)
Crypto ETF Options page: Added BackToTop component for scroll navigation
Crypto ETF Options page: Added OpenGraph images and Twitter card metadata (was completely missing)
Crypto ETF Options page: Fixed Quick Facts grid to use auto-fit minmax(220px, 1fr) for mobile responsiveness instead of fixed 2-column layout

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: bitcoin-mining-profitability-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with ASIC chip pattern, hashrate sparkline, key stats (Difficulty 155.9T, Block Reward 3.125 BTC, Break-even electricity cost), brand gradient title

OG image: crypto-etf-options-trading-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with options payoff diagram (long call/put), ETF ticker badges (IBIT, ETHA, FBTC), position limit highlight, brand gradient title

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/bitcoin-mining-profitability-guide-2026 — 936 lines, server component, 7 UX issues found and fixed
/learn/crypto-etf-options-trading-guide-2026 — 688 lines, server component with Breadcrumb already present, 4 UX issues found and fixed
